children.text: Transfer of appropriations for management personnel and miscellaneous restaurant expenses to special deposit account
Appropriations under this heading for management personnel and miscellaneous restaurant expenses on and after

children.tail: , shall be transferred at the beginning of each fiscal year to the special deposit account in the United States Treasury established under

, all management personnel of the Senate Restaurant facilities shall be paid from the special deposit account. Management personnel transferred hereunder shall be paid at the same rates of pay applicable immediately prior to the date of transfer, and annual and sick leave balances shall be credited to leave accounts of such personnel in the Senate Restaurants.

children.text: Appropriations under this heading, referred to in text, probably means appropriations under the headings “ARCHITECT OF THE CAPITOL”, “

children.tail: ” in the annual Legislative Branch Appropriations Act.

children.text: Section was classified to section 174j–10 of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by
Section is from the Congressional Operations Appropriations Act, 1998, which is title I of the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 1998.
